message:
feat(config): add NTM_CONFIG env var and JSON output for quick command

Config Path Enhancement (config.go):
- Added NTM_CONFIG environment variable support for specifying config path
- Supports tilde expansion (~/path) for convenience
- Takes precedence over XDG_CONFIG_HOME and default paths
- Useful for testing and CI environments where explicit config is needed

Quick Command Enhancements (quick.go):
- Added JSON output support via --json flag for programmatic consumption
- Uses cfg.GetProjectDir(name) to respect projects_base from config instead
  of hardcoded ~/projects path
- Updated help text to reflect platform-aware defaults:
  - macOS: ~/Developer
  - Linux: /data/projects
- Includes fallback to legacy ~/projects behavior if config not initialized

JSON Response Structure (quickResponse):
- working_directory: Full path to created project
- session: Project/session name
- git_initialized: Whether git was initialized
- gitignore_created: Whether .gitignore was created
- vscode_created: Whether VSCode settings were created
- claude_created: Whether Claude config was created
- template_applied: Template name if applied
- warnings: Array of any non-fatal warnings encountered

This enables AI orchestrators and scripts to programmatically create
projects and capture results without parsing human-readable output.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
